title: Battery Widget - can you control the status label that equates to Done?

posts.author: iruser (iruser)
posts.cookedHtml:
My company has chosen the label “Completed” for the status of an action.

I now want to use the battery widget on dashboards.

The battery widget starts with a visualization 0% Done. I have learned i can control the Word done and change it to whatever i want.

How do i tell the widget which label equates to Done / Complete?

Is the widget hard coded to look for status ‘Done’?

If i cannot control this within the widget, is the solution really that i have to go to every single board and action and change the status from Completed to Done?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@iruser

Which labels are considered as “done” for a status column is controlled by going into the status column settings/Customize status column. There will be a list of the different label colors at the bottom. The ones that have a check mark are considered “done”. You can change them by clicking on them.

image640×506 26.3 KB

posts.author: iruser (iruser)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi Jim

This is great to hear! Will the same logic apply to the Overview Widget?

The Overview Widget – Support (monday.com)

makes it sound like the label used for Status must be ‘Done’

thanks!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@iruser

Yes, the Overview widget uses the completed flag on the status labels.
